translation: assert self.deque.pop() == Integer.valueOf(1), "Expected popped value to be 1"
assert self.deque.element() == Integer.valueOf(1), "Expected element to be 1"

body: private static final Integer THREE = Integer.valueOf(3);
private static final Integer TWO = Integer.valueOf(2);
private static final Integer ONE = Integer.valueOf(1);
